metadata.description: A skill pack that takes you from a vague idea to a finished, on-brand, slop-free PowerPoint deck.

plugins.name: slides
plugins.description: A 6-skill pack for going from a vague idea to a finished, on-brand, slop-free .pptx deck. 5 user-invocable skills: teach-slides, narrative, build-deck, slop-check, revise.
